context:
Archive is more organized than my desk; spent an afternoon sorting old emails and deleting clutter; bumped into a former teammate in the elevator; exchanged tips about recurring meetings and calendar tricks; heard that at the new place they do board games on Fridays — not what I expected, but it sounds fun; expressed interest in joining a Friday board games session; Message: I've been keeping a running note of onboarding questions, but sometimes I overthink how to phrase something; Response: That's totally normal — it's easy to overthink wording when you want to make a good impression. If you'd like, paste a few of your questions and I can help make them clear and concise.

            Message:
            My cat walked across the keyboard during a last-week video call and somehow stole the show.

            Response:
            That's hilarious — cats have perfect timing for steals-the-show moments. Bet it gave everyone a good laugh.
